mapper.select: SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = (SELECT rcmmd_artist_id FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = #{rcmmdArtistId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = (SELECT rcmmd_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = #{rcmmdTrackId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = (SELECT rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = #{rcmmdGenreId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = (SELECT rcmmd_mforu_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = #{rcmmdMforuId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT a.member_no memberNo, a.character_no characterNo, a.last_listen_dtime lastListenDateTime, a.listen_cnt listenCount, a.create_dtime createDateTime, a.update_dtime updateDateTime, b.track_id trackId, b.track_nm trackName, IF(f.like_type_id is null, 'N', 'Y') likeYn, b.track_play_tm playTime, b.adult_auth_need_track_yn adultAuthYn, b.track_subtrct_qty subtractQty, IF(b.title_yn = 'Y' , 'Y', 'N') titleYn, IF(b.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR b.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') holdbackYn, b.agency_id agencyId, c.album_id albumId, c.album_img_size size, CONCAT(c.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(c.update_dtime)) AS url, c.update_dtime albumImgUpdateDateTime, e.artist_id artistId, e.artist_nm artistName, b.disp_status_yn displayYn, g.title albumTitle, h.artist_id repArtistId, h.artist_nm repArtistName FROM ( SELECT member_no member_no, character_no character_no, track_id track_id, last_listen_dtime last_listen_dtime, listen_cnt listen_cnt, create_dtime, update_dtime FROM tb_most_listen_track WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY listen_cnt DESC, last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT #{pageable.offset} , #{pageable.pageSize} ) a INNER JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_character_like f ON a.track_id = f.like_type_id AND a.character_no = f.character_no AND like_type = 'TRACK' LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist as d ON b.track_id = d.track_id AND d.rp_yn = 'Y' and d.db_sts = 'A' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON d.artist_id = e.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_album g ON b.album_id = g.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist h ON b.reprsnt_artist_id = h.artist_id WHERE b.disp_status_yn ='Y' ORDER BY listenCount DESC, lastListenDateTime DESC, d.listorder
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_most_listen_track WHERE character_no = #{characterNo}
